generated_oml:
prefix DTDFVocab: "http://example.org/dtdf/vocab#"
prefix base: "http://example.org/base#"
instance JointFrictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Multi-physics-aware joint friction identification enabling precise trajectory tracking"
]
instance RealTimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of robot sensor data and motion parameters for operator decision support"
]
instance JointFrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of joint friction for improving robot motion accuracy through multi-physics analysis",
    DTDFVocab:provides JointFrictionInsight
]
instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Unified dashboard for real-time data visualization and decision support",
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualizationInsight
]
instance SysMLModelingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for multi-level abstraction modeling (requirements, functional architecture, logical architecture, product/technical layer)",
    DTDFVocab:enables JointFrictionIdentificationService
]
instance MontiArcBehavioralEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MontiArc Automaton for behavioral modeling of robot dynamics",
    DTDFVocab:enables JointFrictionIdentificationService
]
instance SimulinkSimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink for analytical simulations of multi-physics robot dynamics",
    DTDFVocab:enables JointFrictionIdentificationService
]
instance ACMEADLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ACME architecture description language for component & connector perspectives",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]
instance AADLADLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "AADL architecture description language for component & connector perspectives",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]
instance MontiArcADLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MontiArc architecture description language for component & connector perspectives",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]
instance CppProgrammingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ programming language for high-performance data processing in digital twin",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]
instance JavaProgrammingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Java programming language for real-time dashboard development",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]
instance UMLClassDiagramEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "UML class diagrams for Digital Shadow Reference Model implementation",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]
instance RFLPMethodologyEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RFLP methodology for structured twinning process including Problem identification, Asset and model analysis, Use or creation of calculations or models, and Data identification steps",
    DTDFVocab:enables JointFrictionIdentificationService
]
instance OOSEMMethodologyEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "OOSEM methodology for managing system complexity in digital twin development",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]
instance SPESMethodologyEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SPES methodology for system engineering processes in digital twin",
    DTDFVocab:enables JointFrictionIdentificationService
]
instance SMArDTMethodologyEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SMArDT methodology for structured twinning process steps",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]
instance MQTTDataTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorInputCurrentSensor, JointOutputAngleSensor,
    base:desc "Time series sensor data transmitted via MQTT protocol from physical system to digital twin"
]
instance MotorInputCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time electrical current measurements from motor",
    DTDFVocab:fromData MQTTDataTransmission,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler, SysMLModelingEnabler
]
instance JointOutputAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time angular position data from robot joints",
    DTDFVocab:fromData MQTTDataTransmission,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler, MontiArcBehavioralEnabler
]
instance StructuralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML structural model using Internal Block Diagrams for geometric representation of MABI MAX 100 robot",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingEnabler
]
instance BehavioralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MontiArc Automaton and SysML v1.7 state machines for behavioral modeling of robot dynamics",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MontiArcBehavioralEnabler, SysMLModelingEnabler
]
instance AnalyticalSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink analytical simulations for multi-physics analysis of robot joints",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]
instance MotorInputCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors measuring electrical current input to the permanent magnet synchronous motor driving the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot",
    DTDFVocab:producedData MQTTDataTransmission
]
instance JointOutputAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors measuring angular position output from robot joints for precise trajectory tracking",
    DTDFVocab:producedData MQTTDataTransmission
]
instance MABIMAX100Robot : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Serial robot MABI MAX 100 with six axes, first axis driven by permanent magnet synchronous motor"
]
instance ManufacturingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains MABIMAX100Robot, MotorInputCurrentSensor, JointOutputAngleSensor
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system utilizes real-time data-driven representations with live measurements and time series of all sensors for synchronization, maintaining temporal granularity based on sensor sampling rates to ensure accurate state representation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The system architecture follows a Digital Shadow Reference Model defined via UML class diagram, comprising components such as Purpose, Data Trace, Asset, Processing, and Model, integrated using component & connector perspective with ADLs including ACME, AADL, MontiArc, and SysML IBDs for structural and behavioral description."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol is used for data transmission between physical and digital components."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliance with industry standards including SysML [17] for systems engineering modeling, ACME [23], AADL [24], MontiArc [25, 26] for architecture description languages, and SysML Internal Block Diagrams (IBDs) [17, 27] for component and connector perspectives. Interoperability between heterogeneous modeling tools and notations is addressed through standardized interfaces to integrate stakeholder perspectives [31]."
]
